steps.expression: (() => { const close = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button')).find((entry) => ((entry.innerText || entry.textContent || '').trim() === 'Close')); if (close) { close.click(); } return true; })()

steps.expression: (() => { const panel = document.querySelector('[data-report-runtime-binding-panel="semantic"]'); const text = (panel?.innerText || panel?.textContent || '').toLowerCase(); return text.includes('selected dimensions (2)'); })()
